creator: eadler@FreeBSD.org
text:
I realized that my description wasn't clear:

I noticed some hacks were added to bsd.port.mk in 2004 due to a bug in make(1).
If the bug in question has been fixed the hacks should be removed.
The attached patch just follows the comments I don't know if the
specific bug in question is fixed yet.

CVS blame says that marcus@ added these in r1.475 on 20-Jan-04



-- 
Eitan Adler
